Package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.testgen

Class CounterExampleAction.MainWindowCounterExampleGenerator

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.counterexample.AbstractCounterExampleGenerator
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.testgen.CounterExampleAction.MainWindowCounterExampleGenerator
Enclosing class:
CounterExampleAction
public static class CounterExampleAction.MainWindowCounterExampleGenerator extends AbstractCounterExampleGenerator
Performs the SemanticsBlastingMacro in a Proof registered in the MainWindow and thus visible to the user. Results are shown with help of the SolverListener.

This class provides only the user interface and no counter example generation logic which is implemented by the AbstractCounterExampleGenerator.

  • Method Details

    • createProof

      protected Proof createProof(UserInterfaceControl ui, Proof oldProof, Sequent oldSequent, String proofName)
      Creates a new Proof.
      Specified by:
      createProof in class AbstractCounterExampleGenerator
      Parameters:
      ui - The UserInterfaceControl to use.
      oldProof - The old Proof used as template to instantiate a new one.
      oldSequent - The Sequent to find a counter example for.
      proofName - The name for the new proof.
      Returns:
      The created Proof.

    • semanticsBlastingCompleted

      protected void semanticsBlastingCompleted(UserInterfaceControl ui)

      Parameters:

    • createSolverListener

      protected SolverLauncherListener createSolverListener(DefaultSMTSettings settings, Proof proof)
      Creates the SolverLauncherListener which handles the results of the launched SMT solver.
      Specified by:
      createSolverListener in class AbstractCounterExampleGenerator
      Parameters:
      settings - The DefaultSMTSettings.
      proof - The Proof on which the SMT solver will be performed.
      Returns:
      The SolverLauncherListener to use.
